'''shahogo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:tabla|tabla]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-h-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tabla|tabla]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| shahogo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæhegeth|shæhegeth]] || [[word:shæhegej|shæhegej]] || [[word:shæhegesh|shæhegesh]] || [[word:shæhege|shæhege]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:shahohogoth|shahohogoth]] || [[word:shahohogoj|shahohogoj]] || [[word:shahohogosh|shahohogosh]] || [[word:shahohogo|shahohogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:shahogoth|shahogoth]] || [[word:shahogoj|shahogoj]] || [[word:shahogosh|shahogosh]] || [[word:shahogo|shahogo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:shahofgoth|shahofgoth]] || [[word:shahofgoj|shahofgoj]] || [[word:shahofgosh|shahofgosh]] || [[word:shahofgof|shahofgof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shahogotho|shahogotho]] || [[word:shahogojo|shahogojo]] || [[word:shahogosho|shahogosho]] || [[word:shahogoko|shahogoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shahogoth|shahogoth]] || [[word:shahogoj|shahogoj]] || [[word:shahogosh|shahogosh]] || [[word:shahogo|shahogo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shahogothol|shahogothol]] || [[word:shahogojol|shahogojol]] || [[word:shahogoshol|shahogoshol]] || [[word:shahogokol|shahogokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shahogothotho|shahogothotho]] || [[word:shahogojojo|shahogojojo]] || [[word:shahogoshosho|shahogoshosho]] || [[word:shahogoko|shahogoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shahogothon|shahogothon]] || [[word:shahogojon|shahogojon]] || [[word:shahogoshon|shahogoshon]] || [[word:shahogokon|shahogokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shahogothoro|shahogothoro]] || [[word:shahogojoro|shahogojoro]] || [[word:shahogoshoro|shahogoshoro]] || [[word:shahogokoro|shahogokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
